elements.name: Source
texts: Parish of Templecarn, in Institute of Irish Studies, and Royal Irish Academy, Parishes of County Donegal / Edited by Angélique Day and Patrick McWilliams. II 1835-6, Mid, West and South Donegal., Ordnance Survey Memoirs of Ireland; v.39, p. 161

elements.name: Rights
texts: Citation for the purposes of criticism

elements.name: Text
texts: "The chief proprietors are the representatives of the late Colonel Leslie, who hold 45 townlands out of 50, 2 belong to the Revd Mr Dixon, 2 to Mr Aitcheson and the glebe to the clergymen. The size of the holdings varies in different parts of the parish according if it be arable or mountain. The townland of Tibhetiobar is occupied by 2 tenants as a grazing farm at 14 pounds a year."
